name: 3-smo-ai-gtm-strategy
description: SMO-AI GTM Strategy Plugin (Phase 3). Converts a locked Phase 2 brain into a deployed, triggered GTM motion at Class A. Selects 1 of 13 playbooks, plans an adaptive asset list, generates assets with voice-in-context (zero hallucination via asset-source-map), scores them on type-specific rubrics plus 8 coherence pairs and traceability, deploys to GHL across 7 surfaces, and triggers via staged rollout with 3 Telegram operator gates.
